a:r.a:t: (250 commercial ships for foreign trade only;
permanently ineligible for coastwise trade i.e., Jones Act
Paid to US vessel owner / operators for each ship in SCF
Vessel and Shipyard Investment Tax Credits (40% and 25%, respectively) from Building Ships in America Act not shown
Chart reads from bottom to top
US crew required to participate in SCF, which states vessels will be crewed IAW
JM: Align objects to each other as appropriate
JM: Ensure vertical alignment as appropriate
JM: Lines are generally ¼ or ½ pt width, solid or dashed, black – other colors may be appropriate, but need to be defined in a legend
JM: Ensure horizontal alignment as appropriate
